title: Guest Complaint Acknowledgment Email Template
subject_template: Acknowledgment of Your Recent Experience at {{hotel_name}}
body_template:
Dear {{guest_name}},

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay at {{hotel_name}}. We are committed to providing exceptional service and ensuring our guests have a memorable experience.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience you encountered during your stay. Please rest assured that your concerns have been forwarded to the relevant department for immediate review and action.

Our team is dedicated to addressing your feedback and ensuring that your next visit exceeds your expectations. We value your patronage and hope to welcome you back soon.

Should you have any further questions or require assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us directly at {{contact_email}} or {{contact_phone}}.

Warm regards,

{{sender_name}}
{{hotel_name}}
{{hotel_address}}
{{hotel_contact_info}}

variables.name: contact_phone
variables.description: Contact phone number for guest inquiries

variables.name: sender_name
variables.description: Name of the person sending the email

variables.name: hotel_contact_info
variables.description: General contact information for the hotel
